# COMMONWEALTH OF PENNSYLVANIA v. JAMES DRAYTON (2010)

## Supreme Court of Pennsylvania.

### COMMONWEALTH OF PENNSYLVANIA, Respondent v. JAMES A. DRAYTON, Petitioner

### No. 1007 MAL 2009

### Decided: December 16, 2010

ORDER

AND NOW, this 16 th day of December, 2010, the Petition for Allowance of Appeal is hereby DENIED.

PER CURIAM
